title: Skirmish on Kinooine
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev=[[Skirmish in the Cantros system]][[Star Wars (1977) 93|''Star Wars'' (1977) 93]]''{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}}'' |conc=[[Skirmish on Kabray]][[Star Wars (1977) 95|''Star Wars'' (1977) 95]] |next=*[[Liberation of Ord Vaug]][[Star Wars (1977) 98|''Star Wars'' (1977) 98]] *[[Battle of Koda Space Station]] |image=[[File:DarkLadyLumiya-SWG4.jpg]] |name=Skirmish on Kinooine |conflict=[[Nagai–Tof War]] |date=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] (c. 39:3-4 GrS)''[[The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs]]'' place the [[Star Wars (1977)|Marvel ''Star Wars'']] issues [[Star Wars (1977) 90|90]] to [[Star Wars (1977) 106|106]] between the [[Declaration of the Alliance of Free Planets]] (set in 39:3 GrS) and the [[Declaration of a New Republic/Legends|Declaration of a New Republic]] (set in 39:4 GrS). |place=[[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]] |result=[[Alliance of Free Planets]] victory[[Star Wars (1977) 96|''Star Wars'' (1977) 96]] *[[Dani/Legends|Dani]] is rescued *[[Lumiya]]'s identity is revealed *Alliance operatives recover vital information regarding the [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] war effort |side1=*Alliance of Free Planets *[[New Jedi Order]] |side2=*Nagai *[[Lumiya's Sith]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Commander/Legends|Commander]]/[[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] |commanders2=*Lumiya *[[Den Siva]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*1 [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Knight **Luke Skywalker *[[Kiro]] |forces2=*Nagai advance scouts **[[Mendo]]† **[[Rei]]† **[[Den Siva]] **[[Taru]]† *1 [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] **Lumiya |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Kiro believed dead |casual2=Lumiya wounded, armor destroyed *Mendo *Rei *Taru |casual3= |casual4= |civilian=[[Faron Tolis]] }} Several '''skirmishes on the planet Kinooine''' stemmed from a series of events that began when a scouting party sent there by [[Alliance of Free Planets]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was abducted and [[Death/Legends|murdered]] by [[Lumiya]], [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]]. Skywalker took notice of their disappearance and, along with fellow [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] [[Kiro]] and the [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Dani/Legends|Dani]], traveled to [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]] in search of them. Upon their arrival, Lumiya brutally attacked Kiro and Dani, taking the Zeltron prisoner while leaving her companion for dead. Skywalker managed to save Kiro before leaving in search of Lumiya. He located and engaged her in a duel which resulted in his capture and subsequent imprisonment within Lumiya's underground lair. The Dark Lady meanwhile went to finalize preparations for the arrival of the [[Nagai expeditionary force|Nagai invasion fleet]], with whom she planned to finally crush the rebellion. Kiro infiltrated Lumiya's base in her absence, killing a Nagai warrior in the process before rescuing Luke Skywalker. Together they found and confronted Lumiya, who fully expected to once again defeat Skywalker in combat; she was unprepared, however, for the Jedi's [[Jar'Kai/Legends|use of two]] [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsabers]]—one long and one [[Shoto lightsaber/Legends|short]]—and was beaten before being stripped of her armor and exposed as former [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent Shira Elan Colla Brie. The Nagai fleet arrived at that moment, forcing Skywalker and Kiro to take Lumiya into custody and hasten their plan to rescue Dani from the bowels Lumiya's lair. They were ultimately successful, though not without casualty; Kiro had been lost in combat with Lumiya's Nagai cohort [[Den Siva]]. With the invaders rapidly dispersed over Kinooine, Luke Skywalker and Dani were forced to abandon Lumiya and flee the planet, also leaving Kiro—whom they believed to be dead. ==Background== {{Quote|There's a scouting party on Kinooine who haven't reported in lately. We're going to check it out…|Luke Skywalker|}} During the preliminary stages of their incursion into known [[Realspace/Legends|space]], the [[Extragalactic/Legends|extra-galactic]] [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] [[Species/Legends|species]] chose the desolate [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kinooine/Legends|Kinooine]] to serve as the staging point for their [[Nagai–Tof War|invasion]] into [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lady of the Sith]] [[Lumiya]] pledged her support to the Nagai, and rendezvoused with their emissary [[Den Siva]] on Kinooine. Together they fortified a hidden underground base of operations, and from there made preparations for the arrival of the [[Nagai expeditionary force|main invasion fleet]]. The sudden surge of activity on the previously uninhabited [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] world caught the attention of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and [[Alliance of Free Planets]] [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]], who sent twenty person [[Scout/Legends|scouting]] party to investigate. The party was intercepted upon arrival by Lumiya and Siva, who executed nineteen of them. Only one, a [[Gender/Legends|male]] named [[Faron Tolis]], was left alive, only to be subjected to [[Torture/Legends|torturous]] interrogation regarding the whereabouts of Alliance leader [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]]. Tolis, who had no direct dealings with Organa, was unable to disclose anything about the Princess' whereabouts. He instead revealed that it had been Lumiya's sworn enemy Luke Skywalker who had sent him to Kinooine. ==Arrival== ===First encounter=== {{Quote|Kiro…did you hear something?''"
"''Wait—what are you—?''"
"''''NO!!!''|Dani and Kiro as Lumiya attacks them|}} [[File:LukeVersusLumiya.jpg|thumb|left|300px|Luke Skywalker and Lumiya's first encounter]] Failure on part of Tolis' team to report their progress was a cause of concern for Commander Skywalker, whose suspicions led him into an investigation. He traveled to Kinooine along with the [[Chuhkyvi]] [[Kiro]] and his [[Zeltron/Legends|Zeltron]] lover [[Dani/Legends|Dani]], and landed their [[Starship/Legends|starship]] near a body of [[Water/Legends|water]] where they also established their camp. Lumiya was aware of their arrival, and stalked Kiro and Dani for a time during their preliminary exploration of the surrounding area, before she violently attacked them with [[Lumiya's lightwhip|her lightwhip]]. Repeated lashes overwhelmed the pair, knocking the Zeltron unconscious and destroying Kiro's necessary aquatic respiration apparatus. The [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lady]] took Dani prisoner, but Kiro—who was left for dead— managed to stumble back towards the camp where he was found and rescued by Luke Skywalker. The commander learned of Dani's abduction while he tended to Kiro's injuries and, when Skywalker was certain that he would recover, left the Chuhkyvi in search of his unknown assailant. Skywalker found the [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborg]] woman waiting for him on a hilltop. They regarded each other in silence as both readied their weapons in preparation for battle. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] had never faced a [[Lightwhip/Legends|lightwhip]]-wielding opponent before, and Lumiya thrashed him repeatedly before he was [[Sun djem/Legends|disarmed]] and defeated. Skywalker recovered and engage the lone [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] again, but when she revealed her weapon's unique combination of energy beams and tendrils of metal and studded leather, he was rendered defenseless yet again and knocked unconscious. Rather than kill him, the Dark Lady collected Skywalker and imprisoned him within her underground stronghold. Den Siva, who had been awaiting her return, congratulated Lumiya on her victory but suggested that Skywalker would be prepared for the dual nature of her lightwhip should he be given a chance to face her again—an opportunity Lumiya was certain would never come. Siva also advised her of events that had unfolded on the planet [[Kabray]] which involved [[Skirmish on Kabray|the defeat]] of thirteen Nagai warriors at the hands of Princess Organa and several Zeltrons. Because of this, Siva asked permission to examine the captive Zeltron Dani with hopes of learning more about her species. Lumiya granted the request while she finalized preparations for the arrival of the [[Nagai expeditionary force|Nagai invasion fleet]]. ===Kiro's mission=== {{Quote|I've carried this blade with me since before I left my homeworld, Iskalon. Well, by the School, let it serve me well today.|Kiro|}} [[File:KiroInfiltratesNagaiBase-SW1977-96.jpg|thumb|right|270px|Kiro attempts to rescue Luke Skywalker.]] Kiro, who had suffered life-threatening wounds during his encounter with Lumiya, managed to effect a sufficient recovery by submerging himself in the body of water near where he and his comrades had lodged. As he anticipated the rescue endeavor he planned to embark on, he was able to convert a normal helmet into one that would provided a constant circulation of fresh [[Water/Legends|water]] to facilitate his breathing. He then collected his short [[Sword/Legends|sword]] and [[Stinger (weapon)|Stinger]] hand-[[Blaster/Legends|blaster]], and set out to find Dani and Luke Skywalker. Kiro located the entrance to the underground stronghold, but was momentarily prevented from entering when several patrolling Nagai warriors appeared. He startled one of them, a male named [[Mendo]], with a slight diversion before he attacked the Nagai and ran him through with his blade. He was forced to take cover as two additional soldiers, [[Rei]] and [[Taru]], returned from a failed attempt to locate the camp and starship of Kiro and his companions. Kiro sneaked into the stronghold behind them, and it did not take him long to locate Commander Skywalker. Kiro revived Skywalker as he blew the cell door open with his Stinger. He proceeded to dress Skywalker's wounds, while discussing with the Jedi plans to rescue Dani. Before they could, however, Skywalker determined that Lumiya had first to be dealt with. He used parts from Kiro's Stinger to fashion a [[Shoto lightsaber/Legends|short bladed-lightsaber]] which, upon recovery of his original weapon, he planned to use against the dual nature of her lightwhip. ===Rematch=== {{Quote|I wanted you alive—alive and without hope! But I'll kill you myself sooner than see you go free!|Lumiya|}} [[File:Lumiya-beaten.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Lumiya is beaten in a rematch with Luke Skywalker.]] Skywalker and Kiro found Lumiya standing outside on a precipice in the barren wastes of Kinooine. Luke caught her by surprise when he used the Force to [[Telekinesis/Legends|summon]] his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] from her side, and revealed that he was also armed with a [[Luke Skywalker's shoto|shoto]] that produced a shorter blade than usual. The dual blades counteracted the two forms of her lightwhip, the combination of which had overwhelmed Skywalker in their initial confrontation. In their first duel, Lumiya refrained from killing Skywalker, being simply content with defeating him in combat. She refused to let him interfere with her plans any further and, as she ignited her lightwhip, told him that his death would satisfy her far more than allowing him to escape. Their rematch began much differently than before, with Lumiya flailing the various strands of her whip in an attempt to overwhelm Skywalker from all angles. In response, the Jedi used his longer lightsaber to entangle the whip's extensions and the shoto to cut them away. He repeated this strategy until Lumiya managed to ensnare the longer blade within her whip's energy strands, at which point Skywalker destroyed the pliant beam with shoto, forcing both his [[Color/Legends|green]]-bladed lightsaber and the [[Hilt/Legends|hilt]] of Lumiya's whip free of their respective grasps. With the cyborg rendered weaponless, Skywalker moved in to attack with his short blade. Lumiya was quickly defeated and stripped of the majority of her armor in the process, revealing her true identity of Shira Brie. The Nagai invasion fleet arrived shortly afterward, forcing Skywalker and Kiro to take the Sith Lady prisoner and go into hiding.[[Star Wars (1977) 97|''Star Wars'' (1977) 97]] ===Dani's rescue=== Faron Tolis, who had also been taken prisoner by Lumiya and the Nagai, attempted to free Dani, but was swiftly killed by Den Siva. As the invasion force began to spread over the surface of Kinooine, Commander Skywalker and Kiro were happened upon by several Nagai warriors. Fighting quickly broke out after a failed attempt by Skywalker to persuade the Nagai to turn away. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|The Nagai invasion fleet is here!|Lumiya gloats to Luke Skywalker|}} While both Luke and Dani escaped, the loss of Kiro weighed heavily on them both. The information Luke stole proved vital to the Alliance cause, however, providing key information on the Nagai plans and capabilities. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars (1977) 95|''Star Wars'' (1977) 95]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 95}} {{1st}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 96|''Star Wars'' (1977) 96]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 96}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 97|''Star Wars'' (1977) 97]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 97}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 99|''Star Wars'' (1977) 99]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 99}} {{Imo}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 100|''Star Wars'' (1977) 100]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 100}} {{Imo}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 102|''Star Wars'' (1977) 102]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 102}} {{Imo}} *[[Star Wars (1977) 103|''Star Wars'' (1977) 103]] {{Reprint|Star Wars (1977) 103}} {{Imo}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *{{GalaxyCite|8|ComicScan|ComicScan: Taken by Force}} *{{GamerCite|1|The University of Sanbra Guide to Intelligent Life: The Marvel Series}} *''[[The New Essential Guide to Characters]]'' *[[Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force (real-life book)|''Jedi vs. Sith: The Essential Guide to the Force'']] *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{Hyperspace|url=fans/hyperspace/source/nagai11202009/index.html|text=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs|int=The Forgotten War: The Nagai and the Tofs}} *{{DB|character|lumiya|Lumiya}} *{{InsiderCite|137|Red Five|Red Five: Joe Corroney on Five Great '}} {{Po}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{GCW Nagai-Tof}} {{Interlang |es=Escaramuza en Kinooine }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kinooine, skirmish on}} [[Category:Battles in Wild Space]] [[Category:Battles of the Nagai-Tof War]] [[Category:Duels]]
